allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"question":"what is broken right now?"}' -w "\\n---STATUS: %{http_code}---\\n")

Bash(curl -s -o /tmp/chat_resp.txt -w "status=%{http_code} time=%{time_total}s\\n" -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"question":"what is broken right now?"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3030/api/agent/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"question":"what is broken right now?"}' -w "\\n---STATUS: %{http_code}---\\n")
